skills.description: Validates diagnosis severity via IGA, EASI, or BSA scores.
skills.logic: Return true if IGA >= 3 OR EASI >= 16 OR BSA >= 10%.

skills.description: Validates failure or contraindication of topical, calcineurin, and systemic therapies.
skills.logic: Verify 4 weeks of topical steroid, 4 weeks of calcineurin inhibitor, and 3 months of systemic immunosuppressant (or contraindication).
